ops.body: T3 watcher retrain GO (2026-07-16 ~21:40Z): all gates green — T3.1+T3.1.1 committed (41950b4f, a2804814, 40516247 on the unpushed cc-steer stack), sol finder/refuter review + narrow re-check CLEAN (boundary adversarially probed with injected TinkerError/RuntimeError/FileNotFoundError; KeyboardInterrupt/MemoryError propagation confirmed; the row-mapping test mutation-tested via rotated tails; gate/threshold/write_probs blocks byte-identical to the reviewed commit), my independent pytest + scoped Linux docker ty green, validation artifact scored 0.9291 served AUC, fresh-epoch one-shot guard clean (no watcher probs on the clean frame). Launched `uv run --extra retrain cc-steer retrain --component watcher --fresh-epoch` from the local tree (new Tinker training run under the $15 recipe cap; the gate now scores the converted artifact over the full frozen frame locally, ~26 min at 0.4 rows/s; serving-drift diagnostic persists regardless of outcome). On promote: registry + kickstart, verify daemon serves the clean watcher, then push + release cc-steer v0.14 (REQUIRED before Sunday 07-19 04:00 — the weekly lane runs from PyPI and would otherwise re-run the deleted parity gate from v0.13.0), then verify the weekly pass journals gate-skip + watcher digest-unchanged skip. Nondeterminism note: this trains a NEW candidate — its served AUC will differ from 0.9291; the floor is the gate.
